## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Resource Checklist

- [ ] I used the format `- [Name](https://example.com/) - Description.`
- [ ] The URL is official or stable.
- [ ] I used the official source when one is available.
- [ ] Commercial, proprietary, or access-limited status is clearly labeled when relevant.
- [ ] Tags are used sparingly and only where they improve curation.
- [ ] The resource is in the most specific appropriate section.
- [ ] The entry is alphabetized where reasonable.
- [ ] I checked internal relative links.
- [ ] I did not add pirated PDFs, spam, or low-quality promotional pages.
- [ ] I disclosed any affiliation with added resources.

## Notes

Add context for maintainers, including any deprecation, replacement, or link-verification notes.
